recommendations.title: Grease Live
recommendations.overview: After enjoying a holiday romance, high school students Danny and Sandy are unexpectedly reunited when she transfers to Rydell High, where she must contend with cynical Rizzo and the Pink Ladies.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: For the Birds

recommendations.title: Reptilicus

recommendations.title: Roger Waters: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A concert film that the former Pink Floyd singer-songwriter made on various tour dates between 2010 and 2013, when he was playing his former group's 1980 double-album in its entirety.

recommendations.title: Purple Rain
recommendations.overview: A victim of his own anger, the Kid is a Minneapolis musician on the rise with his band, the Revolution, escaping a tumultuous home life through music. While trying to avoid making the same mistakes as his truculent father, the Kid navigates the club

recommendations.title: Fantasia 2000
recommendations.overview: Blending lively music and brilliant animation, this sequel to the original 'Fantasia' restores 'The Sorcerer's Apprentice' and adds seven new shorts.
recommendations.director: Francis Glebas, Don Hahn, Paul Brizzi, James Algar, Eric Goldberg, Pixote Hunt, Gaëtan Brizzi, Hendel Butoy

recommendations.title: Bandslam
recommendations.overview: A  new kid in town assembles a fledgling rock band — together, they achieve their dreams and compete against the best in the biggest event of the year, a battle of the bands.

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.
